title: Talking about where you're from
description: The most common conversation starter in Hong Kong — and how to explain your background

turns.speaker: user
turns.chinese: 我係香港出世，但係喺外國住咗好多年。
turns.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 hoeng1 gong2 ceot1 sai3 daan6 hai6 hai2 ngoi6 gwok3 zyu6 zo2 hou2 do1 nin4
turns.romanization: Ngo⁵ hai⁶ hoeng¹ gong² ceot¹ sai³, daan⁶ hai⁶ hai² ngoi⁶ gwok³ zyu⁶ zo² hou² do¹ nin⁴.
turns.english: I was born in Hong Kong but lived abroad for many years.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: hai6 me1 faan1 lai4 gei2 noi6 laa3
turns.romanization: Hai⁶ me¹! Faan¹ lai⁴ gei² noi⁶ laa³?
turns.english: Really! How long have you been back?

turns.speaker: user
turns.chinese: 返咗一年幾，仲學緊廣東話。
turns.jyutping: faan1 zo2 jat1 nin4 gei2 zung6 hok6 gan2 gwong2 dung1 waa2
turns.romanization: Faan¹ zo² jat¹ nin⁴ gei², zung⁶ hok⁶ gan² gwong² dung¹ waa².
turns.english: About a year and a half. Still learning Cantonese.

turns.speaker: other
turns.jyutping: nei5 gong2 dak1 hou2 hou2 ga3 gaa1 jau4
turns.romanization: Nei⁵ gong² dak¹ hou² hou² ga³, gaa¹ jau⁴!
turns.english: You speak really well, keep it up!

turns.speaker: user
turns.jyutping: do1 ze6 nei5 ngo5 wui5 gai3 zuk6 nou5 lik6
turns.romanization: Do¹ ze⁶ nei⁵! Ngo⁵ wui⁵ gai³ zuk⁶ nou⁵ lik⁶.
turns.english: Thank you! I'll keep working at it.
